normal_cases.name: Canonical `sisyphus` CLI, MCP, evolution, and runtime imports work after `src/taskflow` removal.
Repo-local tests patch and import `sisyphus.*` directly.

edge_cases.name: `import taskflow` no longer resolves after package removal.
`.sisyphus.toml` preference and `.taskflow.toml` fallback continue to work.
`taskflow.event.v1` remains unchanged as a persisted schema identifier.

exception_cases.name: Focused regressions across taskflow-removal-sensitive surfaces catch hidden dependency drift before close.

verification_methods.target: Canonical sisyphus runtime imports succeed and taskflow is absent
verification_methods.method: env PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache ./.venv/bin/python -c "import importlib; import sisyphus, sisyphus.cli, sisyphus.mcp_server, sisyphus.evolution.constraints; print(sisyphus.__version__); print(importlib.util.find_spec('taskflow'))"

verification_methods.target: Focused runtime regressions remain green after removing src/taskflow
verification_methods.method: env PYTHONPYCACHEPREFIX=/tmp/pycache ./.venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_taskflow tests.test_mcp_core tests.test_mcp_adapter tests.test_mcp_server tests.test_evolution tests.test_event_bus tests.test_golden -v
